Defines the TypeError.prototype built-in object and its properties for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines the properties and identifiers for the `TypeError.prototype` object in a JavaScript engine. It uses macros to specify the object identifier and its properties, which include the constructor, name, and message attributes. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns the identifier `ECMA_BUILTIN_ID_TYPE_ERROR_PROTOTYPE` to the `TypeError.prototype` object. The `OBJECT_VALUE` and `STRING_VALUE` macros define the properties of the object, such as `constructor`, `name`, and `message`, with their respective attributes set to configurable and writable. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent conflicts with other parts of the code.
